flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at North Park University fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (69.8% → 61.7%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at North Park University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($33.0k → $36.7k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at North Park University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($33.0k → $36.7k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at North Park University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.2% → 0.0%).
